content:
# Session 2 (iter-002) ‚Äî review summary

## Metadata
- Iter/session: 002 / session_2. Model: opus. Mode: prove.
- 3 prover lanes (M1 WeilDivisor, M2 H1Vanishing, M3 RRFormula). OcOfD untouched.
- 26 edits, 14 diagnostic checks, 15 lemma searches, 6 transient errors, 0 final build errors.
- Per-file sorry (code): H1Vanishing 1‚Üí1, RRFormula 7‚Üí5, WeilDivisor 3‚Üí3, OcOfD 4‚Üí4 (untouched). Net ‚àí2, but the qualitative wins dominate (below).

## Headline result ‚Äî iter-001 CRITICAL #1 RESOLVED
`Scheme.H1_skyscraperSheaf_finrank_eq_zero` is now **axiom-clean**
(`lean_verify` re-run first-hand this review: `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`,
no `sorryAx`). iter-001 had shown it carried `sorryAx` transitively via
`HModule_flasque_eq_zero ‚Üí ..._subsingleton_aux (succ) ‚Üí injective_flasque`.
Fix was exactly the iter-001 recommendation: factor the `i=1` base case out of the
strong-induction carrier into `HModule_flasque_one_eq_zero` (the zero branch was
*already* an `injective_flasque`-free proof using only Mathlib's `Injective.injective_under`
hull), then repoint the headline through it. `injective_flasque` (S5 `j_!` gap) left
untouched; the general induction `thm:H1_vanishing_flasque` still carries `sorryAx` but
the headline no longer depends on it.

## Per-target detail

### M2 H1Vanishing ‚Äî SOLVED (lane objective complete)
- `HModule_flasque_one_eq_zero` (new): base case via `injectiveSES_shortExact` +
  `IsFlasque.shortExact_app_surjective hF ‚ä§` + `ext_one_eq_zero_of_hom_surjective_of_injective`
  + `Module.finrank_zero_of_subsingleton`. Compiles, axiom-clean.
- Headline repointed (see above). No new code-sorry; the *deliverable* was the
  transitive-`sorryAx` removal, not a raw count drop.

### M3 RRFormula ‚Äî false-signature FIXED + 1 caller solved + 1 caller S2-gapped
- `eulerCharacteristic_shortExact_add` (L377): was **false as typed** (iter-001 CRITICAL).
  Now carries a 5-instance `[FiniteDimensional kbar (HModule kbar S.X·µ¢ j)]` package;
  the sixth group `H¬π(X‚ÇÉ)` is *derived* in-body via `Module.Finite.of_surjective f‚ÇÑ hf‚ÇÑ`
  (skyscraper H¬π is only public as `finrank=0`, which does NOT imply `FiniteDimensional`;
  the `Subsingleton` lives in a private helper). Body sorry-free modulo the single
  designated S3 `hvan : Subsingleton (Abelian.Ext L S.X‚ÇÅ 2)` (Grothendieck H¬≤-vanishing).
- `eulerCharacteristic_of_shortExact_skyscraper`: SOLVED. Notable obstacle ‚Äî
  `Module.Finite.equiv`/`.finiteDimensional` transport across `e : S.X‚ÇÉ ‚âÖ k(P)`
  **failed at instance synthesis** (new helper `HModule_linearEquiv_of_iso`'s own
  `HasSheafify`/`HasExt` binders don't key-match the ambient `H0` instance; deterministic
  20000-heartbeat typeclass timeout). Fix: transport at the **`finrank` level**
  (`LinearEquiv.finrank_eq` ‚Üí `H0_skyscraperSheaf_finrank_eq_one` ‚Üí
  `FiniteDimensional.of_finrank_eq_succ (n:=0)`), which matches up to defeq where
  *synthesis* did not. **Reusable pattern (KB).**
- `eulerCharacteristic_sheafOf_succ`: PARTIAL. Four S2 Serre coherent-cohomology
  finiteness instances supplied as documented typed sorries (no Mathlib support;
  `sheafOf` itself is an OcOfD typed sorry).
- New helper `HModule_linearEquiv_of_iso` (~L673): sheaf-iso ‚áí degree-wise `HModule`
  linear equiv. **Unmatched** (no blueprint block) ‚Äî flagged for planner.

### M1 WeilDivisor ‚Äî false-signature FIXED + assigned sorry closed; ring core isolated
- `rationalMap_order_finite_support`: added `[CompactSpace X]` (iter-001 false-signature
  fix), body closed via `isCompact_iff_finite_and_eq_biUnion_affineOpens` (finite affine
  cover from compactness) + `Set.Finite.biUnion`. Strengthened 7 consumers' signatures.
- `instCompactSpaceLeftOfIsProper` (new instance): `[CompactSpace S] [IsProper C.hom] ‚áí
  CompactSpace C.left` via `QuasiCompact.compactSpace_of_compactSpace`. Fires cross-file;
  curve-side + OCofP + RationalCurveIso consumers got it for free (full build green).
- `finite_order_support_on_affineOpen` (new): open-chart reduction, **sorry-free**.
  Transient error: `Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem` ‚Üí corrected to `...notMem` (Mathlib rename).
- `finite_order_support_affine` (new): the irreducible affine-`Spec` ring core of
  Hartshorne II.6.1 / Stacks 02RV. **Residual sorry** ‚Äî genuine Mathlib gap
  (affine stalk=localization + `ordFrac`=adic-valuation bridge; project order-naturality
  covers only the open-immersion `stalkIso`, not the affine `isoSpec`). `Ideal.finite_minimalPrimes_of_isNoetherianRing`
  verified present. ~150‚Äì300 LOC substrate. NO informal-agent (env has no API key).

## Subagent reports (all clean ‚Äî 0 critical / 0 must-fix)
- `lean-auditor/iter002`: 0 critical, 4 major (all **stale module-level docstrings** in
  `.lean`, NOT code defects), 2 minor. All iter-002 focus items cleared
  (binders genuine, helpers honest). Report: `logs/iter-002/lean-auditor-iter002-report.md`.
- `lean-vs-blueprint-checker/h1vanishing`: PASS, 1 major (stale headline docstring L1409‚Äì1417).
  All 4 axiom/uses claims verified truthful. Blueprint side correct.
- `lean-vs-blueprint-checker/rrformula`: faithful, 0 blocking, 3 minor blueprint tightenings.
  `eulerCharacteristic_shortExact_add` fix sound; 5 sorries honestly documented.
- `lean-vs-blueprint-checker/weildivisor`: SOUND, 0 red flags, 2 minor. iter-001
  false-signature flag **resolved**; residual sorry honestly scoped.

## Notes (LOW)
- Minor (auditor): un-synthesizable `[‚Ä¶]` typeclass binder in
  `degree_positivePart_principal_eq_finrank` ‚Äî should be explicit arg or backed by an instance.
- 4 new unmatched Lean decls need blueprint blocks (see recommendations).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. The deterministic `sync_leanok` (iter 2, sha af047c2) added 12 `\leanok` across
  the 3 RR chapters; all confirmed appropriate by the lvb-checkers. No `\mathlibok` owed
  on existing blocks, no `\lean{}` renames flagged, no stale `\notready` (none exist),
  no `\leanok` override needed. The 4 new helpers have no blocks yet (planner authors prose
  ‚Üí future review marks). The H1Vanishing chapter's axiom-clean `% NOTE`s were already
  written by the plan/writer this iter and verified correct.

## Recommendations
See `recommendations.md`. Headline-adjacent: the œá-chain's deep substrate gaps are now
cleanly isolated ‚Äî S1 (dim-1-regular‚áíDVR), S2 (Serre finiteness), S3 (`hvan` H¬≤-vanishing),
S5 (`injective_flasque`/`j_!`), plus the WeilDivisor affine ring bridge. All are
mathlib-build/substrate lanes; none are inline-closeable.
